title: Default parameter values should not be passed as arguments
description: Default parameter values should not be passed as argumentsAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEfindingclumsyWhy is this an issue?Specifying the default parameter values in a method call is redundant. Such values should be omitted in the interests of readability.Noncompliant code examplepublic void M(int x, int y=5, int z = 7) { /* ... */ } // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Detect method calls passing default parameter values explicitly
logic.triggering_conditions: Method call passes value that matches parameter's default
logic.exclusion_conditions: Complex - requires semantic analysis to know default values
never_trigger_on: Overloaded methods where clarity is needed
logic.reasoning: Passing default parameter values explicitly is redundant. However, detecting this requires knowing method signatures and default values (semantic analysis). This simplified version marks it for manual review. Full implementation needs semantic analysis.

should_trigger: Configure(false); // where verbose has default = false

checks.message: Default parameter values should not be passed as arguments
